requirement: Map reusable assets from PHR/DMOS for Tutorputor

fromPHR.rationale: Tutorputor requires student consent for data collection and analytics. PHR consent UI component provides GDPR-compliant consent capture and revocation.
fromPHR.adaptationNotes: Adapt healthcare-specific language to education context. Remove HIPAA references, add FERPA compliance notes.
fromPHR.tutorputorUseCase: Student data collection consent, learning analytics consent, parental consent for minors

fromPHR.rationale: Tutorputor requires immutable audit logging for educational content changes and student data access. PHR audit trail service provides tamper detection and compliance reporting.
fromPHR.adaptationNotes: Adapt healthcare audit categories to education context (e.g., curriculum changes, grade modifications).
fromPHR.tutorputorUseCase: Curriculum modification audit, grade change audit, student data access audit

fromPHR.rationale: Tutorputor requires strict tenant isolation for multi-tenant learning environments. PHR tenant isolation middleware provides signed JWT validation and cross-tenant data leakage prevention.
fromPHR.adaptationNotes: Minimal adaptation needed. Tenant model is compatible with learning environment isolation requirements.
fromPHR.tutorputorUseCase: School/institution tenant isolation, student data boundary enforcement

fromPHR.rationale: Tutorputor requires caching for frequently accessed learning materials. PHR distributed cache integration provides Redis-backed caching with multi-node synchronization.
fromPHR.adaptationNotes: Adapt cache invalidation strategy for learning material updates instead of consent changes.
fromPHR.tutorputorUseCase: Learning content cache, assessment question cache, student progress cache

fromDMOS.rationale: Tutorputor needs student engagement analytics dashboard. DMOS marketing analytics dashboard provides visualization patterns for metrics and trends.
fromDMOS.adaptationNotes: Replace marketing metrics with education metrics (engagement time, quiz scores, completion rates).
fromDMOS.tutorputorUseCase: Student engagement dashboard, learning progress visualization, assessment analytics

fromDMOS.rationale: Tutorputor needs rate limiting for public learning content access to prevent abuse. DMOS rate limiting policy provides tenant-specific limits and graceful degradation.
fromDMOS.adaptationNotes: Adjust rate limits for learning content access patterns (read-heavy, write-light).
fromDMOS.tutorputorUseCase: Learning content API rate limiting, assessment submission rate limiting
